name: Welcome to Grizzlython, the next Solana Hackathon
snippet:
The Grand Champion will receive $50,000 USDC, three passes to Breakpoint 2023, ranging from $30,000 USDC to $10,000 USDC.
Projects will be eligible for: The Grand Champion will receive $50,000 USDC, three passes to Breakpoint 2023, and the chance to present their projects to the greater Solana community.
